title: Angels We Have Heard on High
author: Gloria
snippet: Angels we have heard on high Sweetly singing o'er the plains, And the mountains in reply Echo back their joyous strains.

title: Psalm 128
author: SUNO AI x Jim Ngo
snippet: Blessed are those who fear the Lord and walk in his ways.

title: Colossians 3:15a
author: Josh Blakesley - SP2026
snippet: Let the peace of Christ control your hearts; Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly.

title: Born This Day
author: Ken Canedo
snippet: The people who wandered in darkness have seen a marvelous light. And on those who lived too long in the shadows, a great light shines.

title: Shout to the Lord
author: Darlene Zscheck/Ed Bolduc
snippet: My Jesus, my Savior Lord, there is none like You All of my days, I want to praise The wonders of Your mighty love

title: Child of the poor/What child is this
author: Scott Soper/W. Chatterton Dix
snippet: Helpless and hungry, lowly he lies, wrapped in the chill of midwinter; comes now among us, born into povertys embrace, new life for the world.

title: Joy to the World
author: Phil Wickham
snippet: Joy to the world the Lord is come Let earth receive her King Let every heart prepare Him room And Heaven and nature sing And Heaven and nature sing And Heaven and Heaven and nature sing

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
